zh.Thirsk, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾瑟斯克
zh.Of Sessay, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾瑟賽
zh.Westborough, Lincolnshire, England: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾維斯特波洛
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Darrell於1235年出生在英國越可爾瑟賽時，他的父親Sir Marmaduke de Darrell of Sessay-8歲，母親Helenisa De Insula-14歲。他於大約1289年與Joan De Holtby在英國英格蘭越可爾瑟賽結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1341年在法國皮卡迪索姆享年106歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Darrell于1235年出生在英国越可爾瑟賽时，他的父亲Sir Marmaduke de Darrell of Sessay-8岁，母亲Helenisa De Insula-14岁。他于大约1289年与Joan De Holtby在英国英格兰越可爾瑟賽结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1341年在法国皮卡迪索姆享年106岁。

nameMeanings.name: Darrell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, for someone from Airelle in Calvados, France, or Airel in La Manche, Normandy. Compare Dorrell .

variants.name: Dural
meanings: Turkish: ornamental name or nickname from dural ‘always the same’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When William Darrell was born in 1235, in Sessay, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Marmaduke de Darrell of Sessay, was -8 and his mother, Helenisa De Insula, was -14. He married Joan De Holtby about 1289, in Sessay, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1341, in Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 106.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Darrell est né en 1235, à Sessay, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Marmaduke de Darrell of Sessay, avait -8 ans et sa mère, Helenisa De Insula, avait -14 ans. Il a épousé Joan De Holtby environ 1289, à Sessay, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1341, à Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 106 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Darrell 1235 in Sessay, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Marmaduke de Darrell of Sessay -8 und seine Mutter Helenisa De Insula -14. Er hat um 1289 in Sessay, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Joan De Holtby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1341 im Alter von 106 Jahren in Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Darrell è nato il nel 1235 nel Sessay, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Marmaduke de Darrell of Sessay, aveva -8 anni e il suo madre, Helenisa De Insula, aveva -14 anni. Lui sposato Joan De Holtby circa 1289, nel Sessay, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1341, nel Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 106 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Darrellが1235年にイギリスヨークシュアイアセッサイで生まれた時，父Sir Marmaduke de Darrell of Sessayは-8歳，母Helenisa De Insulaは-14歳であった。約1289年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアセッサイでJoan De Holtbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1341年にフランスピカーディソンメで106歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Darrell(이)가 1235년 영국 요르크실르 세지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Marmaduke de Darrell of Sessay(은)는 -8세였고, 그의 어머니 Helenisa De Insula(은)는 -14세였다. 그는 대략 1289년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 세지에서 Joan De Holtby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1341년 프랑스 피카디 솜에서 106세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Darrell родился в 1235 г. в местности сессеи, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Marmaduke de Darrell of Sessay было -8 год, а матери, которую звали Helenisa De Insula, -14. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan De Holtby около 1289 г. в местности сессеи, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1341 г. в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 106 лет.
